Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class HealthRecord.Medication

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.Entry
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.EntryWithReasons
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.Medication
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
HealthRecord
public class HealthRecord.Medication extends HealthRecord.EntryWithReasons
Medication is a prescription or administration of a medication.

    • Medication

      time - the time of the entry
      type - the type of the entry

  • Method Details

    • getQuantity

      public long getQuantity()
      Get the quantity of medication prescribed or administered. If "prescriptionDetails" was specified, the quantity is calculated based on the amount, frequency, period, and duration. If those details are not present, the default quantity for an administration is 1 and the default quantity for a prescription is 30 (daily prescription for one month).
      Returns:
      calculated quantity of medication, or 30 by default.
